data.body: Pushed both stacked changes to Gerrit: 586 (43c9, shared TDD standard + skill integration, 10 files) and 587 (e8d3, code-review-tests rubric antipatterns + 5 eval cases). All AC proving commands green locally (drift test, full make test, lint, prompt-index no-diff, no routing/E5 changes). Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified votes; will close tickets bottom-up after Verified +1 and submit the stack top.
